title: The Sacred Bridge: Carta's Atlas of the Biblical World
author: Anson F. Rainey; R. Steven Notley
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted reference atlas. Project stores its own summaries of identifications and routes only; no map reproductions.
summary: Standard scholarly atlas of biblical historical geography. Used here for site identifications (Besor, Gilboa, Beth-shan, Hebron, Jabesh-gilead candidates, Ziklag candidates) and for regional route reasoning.
confidenceNotes: Card seeded from team knowledge; page-level citations to be added during the citation verification pass (M1).
